title: hide me armor
description: A fairly simple mod to cover various items or hand items that you or other players on the server have transparency adjustments
body:
Hide Me Armor (Fabric) This mod adds simple yet powerful customization for the transparency of your armor and held items. Take full control over how visible your character appears in both first-person and third-person views — from slight transparency to invisible.

✨ Features:

🔧 Adjustable transparency for all armor pieces (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)

✋ Separate transparency setting for held items

🎯 Flexible values (0% = fully invisible, 100% = default look)

🧩 Client-side only (no need to install on servers)

⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly

Perfect for screenshots and videos

⚙️Controls:

Press K (or any key you assign in settings) to open the transparency menu All the armor hiding options you could ever need, in one intuitive GUI. Including:
